overview: Men's Life & Wellness Center provides individualized hormone replacement therapy and integrated lifestyle programs for men across the Detroit Metropolitan Area. Treatment includes testosterone therapy, HGH therapy, and customized medical weight-loss programs.
highlights: In-house blood work available by appointment
Telehealth visits available after initial in-office consultation
Offers weight-loss medications including Semaglutide and B12
targetAudience: Men seeking to optimize testosterone levels and overall health through hormone replacement therapy.
